disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Almost all the passengers and crew of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak who had to quarantine in the Netherlands are now allowed to return home, the WHO chief said. I via ANC 24/7 Link of full story in the comment section.
updates.body_en: Almost all the passengers and crew of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak who had to quarantine in the Netherlands are now allowed to return home, the WHO chief said. I via ANC 24/7 Link of full story in the comment section. facebook.com
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称荷兰邮轮汉坦疫情隔离者几乎全部获准回家。
